name: Adnene Khalfa
title: Founder
bio: Over a decade of experience building distributed systems, serverless architectures, and developer tools. Previously led engineering teams at high-growth startups. Passionate about eliminating undifferentiated infrastructure work so developers can focus on their products.

name: RocketHooks Team
title: Engineering Team
bio: The team behind RocketHooks, building the API transformation platform that turns REST endpoints into real-time event streams. Experts in serverless architecture, event-driven systems, and developer experience.

name: Sarah Chen
title: Senior Developer Advocate
bio: Full-stack engineer with deep expertise in API integrations, event-driven systems, and developer tooling. Previously built integration platforms serving millions of API calls daily at enterprise SaaS companies.

name: Marcus Rodriguez
title: Solutions Architect
bio: Infrastructure and DevOps specialist focused on serverless architectures, API reliability patterns, and enterprise integration strategies. Contributor to multiple open-source monitoring projects.
